title: taraxacum excellens f. excellens
intro: Taraxacum excellens f. excellens, also known as the excellent dandelion, is a subspecies of the dandelion plant that is native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. Taraxacum excellens f. excellens can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
